prompt: A cinematic, ultra-photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young woman standing on a quiet rocky beach during golden hour, facing slightly sideways with her eyes gently closed, embracing herself with crossed arms as if enjoying the cool ocean breeze. Medium-length wavy chestnut-brown hair flows naturally in the wind with loose strands across her face. She wears an oversized warm cinnamon-brown knitted sweater with soft textured fabric and long sleeves covering part of her hands. Her expression is peaceful, calm, and introspective, capturing a quiet emotional moment of serenity and self-reflection. The ocean stretches softly into the distance with gentle waves fading into a dreamy horizon beneath muted pastel clouds. Warm amber sunset light wraps around her face, creating delicate rim lighting on her hair while soft shadows shape her features. The atmosphere is tranquil, intimate, and nostalgic, with subtle haze diffusing the sunlight. Rich warm earth tones blend with cool blue-gray ocean hues, producing a timeless cinematic color palette. Captured on a full-frame camera using an 85mm prime lens, f/1.4 aperture, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the face, creamy background bokeh, natural film grain, realistic skin texture, soft contrast, high dynamic range, Kodak Portra 400 inspired color grading, warm highlights, muted shadows, subtle vignette, editorial fashion photography, luxury lifestyle aesthetic, emotional storytelling, natural wind movement, authentic candid pose, minimal composition, magazine-quality portrait, IMAX-level realism, 8K ultra-detailed, volumetric sunset lighting, physically accurate rendering, premium photography, no artificial beauty filters.
promptEn: A cinematic, ultra-photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young woman standing on a quiet rocky beach during golden hour, facing slightly sideways with her eyes gently closed, embracing herself with crossed arms as if enjoying the cool ocean breeze. Medium-length wavy chestnut-brown hair flows naturally in the wind with loose strands across her face. She wears an oversized warm cinnamon-brown knitted sweater with soft textured fabric and long sleeves covering part of her hands. Her expression is peaceful, calm, and introspective, capturing a quiet emotional moment of serenity and self-reflection. The ocean stretches softly into the distance with gentle waves fading into a dreamy horizon beneath muted pastel clouds. Warm amber sunset light wraps around her face, creating delicate rim lighting on her hair while soft shadows shape her features. The atmosphere is tranquil, intimate, and nostalgic, with subtle haze diffusing the sunlight. Rich warm earth tones blend with cool blue-gray ocean hues, producing a timeless cinematic color palette. Captured on a full-frame camera using an 85mm prime lens, f/1.4 aperture, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the face, creamy background bokeh, natural film grain, realistic skin texture, soft contrast, high dynamic range, Kodak Portra 400 inspired color grading, warm highlights, muted shadows, subtle vignette, editorial fashion photography, luxury lifestyle aesthetic, emotional storytelling, natural wind movement, authentic candid pose, minimal composition, magazine-quality portrait, IMAX-level realism, 8K ultra-detailed, volumetric sunset lighting, physically accurate rendering, premium photography, no artificial beauty filters.
promptZh: 一张电影级、超写实的人像照片，主角是 一位美丽的年轻女性，站在 黄金时刻宁静的岩石海滩 上，身体微微侧向，双眼轻闭，双臂交叉环抱自己，仿佛在享受凉爽的海风。中长款栗棕色波浪卷发随风自然飘动，几缕发丝散落在脸颊上。她穿着一件 超大款温暖肉桂棕色针织毛衣，面料质感柔软，长袖遮住部分手部。她的表情宁静、平和且富有内省感，捕捉到了一个安静、祥和与自我反思的情感瞬间。远处的海洋在柔和的波浪中延伸，隐入梦幻般的地平线，上方是柔和的粉彩色云朵。温暖的琥珀色夕阳包裹着她的脸庞，在发丝上勾勒出精致的轮廓光，柔和的阴影塑造出面部轮廓。氛围宁静、亲密且怀旧，淡淡的薄雾漫射着阳光。浓郁的暖色大地色调与冷蓝灰色的海洋色调交融，呈现出永恒的电影级色彩组合。使用全画幅相机搭配 85mm 定焦镜头拍摄，f/1.4 大光圈，浅景深，面部焦点清晰，背景虚化如奶油般柔美，带有自然的胶片颗粒感，真实的皮肤纹理，柔和的对比度，高动态范围，Kodak Portra 400 风格调色，暖色高光，柔和阴影，细微暗角，时尚杂志摄影风格，奢华生活方式美学，情感叙事，自然的风吹动感，真实的抓拍姿态，极简构图，杂志级人像，IMAX 级写实感，8K 超高清细节，体积感夕阳光效，物理级精准渲染，高端摄影，无人工美颜滤镜。
